title: NIST Special Publication 800-53 Revision 5: Security and Privacy Controls for Information Systems and Organizations - CM-6
authors: National Institute of Standards and Technology
abstract_text: NIST Special Publication 800-53 Revision 5 provides a catalog of security and privacy controls for information systems and organizations.

sections.title: CM-6 source section
sections.text: NIST Special Publication 800-53 Revision 5 places control CM-6 in the Configuration Management family. The control title for CM-6 is Configuration Settings. This source section is limited to the named control, its family, and its title for deterministic hard-recall benchmarking.

sections.title: RA-3 distractor section
sections.text: A separate nearby control, RA-3, belongs to the Risk Assessment family and is titled Risk Assessment. It is included only as a distractor section for context packing.
